revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:大嘗祭, en:Daijosai); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96391510 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大嘗祭 | revid=96391510 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=版指定削除|page1=大嘗祭|date1=2018年10月13日 }} == 仏教の影響について == かなり素朴な疑問なのですが、大嘗祭の儀式に「仏教的色彩なども取り入れられた」とは具体的に何を指すのでしょうか？先帝の葬祭における仏教形式の導入や火葬については大嘗祭自体とは関係がありませんし、密教系の即位礼である「即位灌頂」も別個の儀式ですし、大嘗祭の式次第にどのような仏教様式が取り入れられたのでしょうか。--[[利用者:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月14日 (水) 08:24 (UTC) :「仏教的色彩云々」について取り除きました。--[[利用者:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月21日 (水) 12:21 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 悠紀と主基について == 明治天皇の際の主基に安房国とあるのは阿波国を指すのではないかと思うのですが、どなたかお詳しい方確認願えますでしょうか?--Wileecoyote81 2012年4月26日 (木) 07:32 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201325263 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijosai | revid=1201325263 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y|royalty=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=}} }}
== Translation and transcription from ja.wikipedia.org version? ==
I've read through both the English and Japanese versions of the article, and there's so much information present in the latter but not the former, even notation of items such as the ''inetsuki-no-uta''. I hope that the English page will be renovated to hold this information as well. I'd also personally advise that the difference between the ''inamiden'' and ''takakaya-no-mikura'' be clarified, in the English and Japanese versions alike.
Best regards and have a lovely day, Alex. [[Special:Contributions/2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658]] ([[User talk:2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|talk]]) 00:08, 26 May 2023 (UTC)
:I agree. The article would be improved this way [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 04:36, 26 May 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96391510 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大嘗祭 | revid=96391510 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=版指定削除|page1=大嘗祭|date1=2018年10月13日 }} == 仏教の影響について == かなり素朴な疑問なのですが、大嘗祭の儀式に「仏教的色彩なども取り入れられた」とは具体的に何を指すのでしょうか？先帝の葬祭における仏教形式の導入や火葬については大嘗祭自体とは関係がありませんし、密教系の即位礼である「即位灌頂」も別個の儀式ですし、大嘗祭の式次第にどのような仏教様式が取り入れられたのでしょうか。--[[User:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月14日 (水) 08:24 (UTC) :「仏教的色彩云々」について取り除きました。--[[User:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月21日 (水) 12:21 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 悠紀と主基について == 明治天皇の際の主基に安房国とあるのは阿波国を指すのではないかと思うのですが、どなたかお詳しい方確認願えますでしょうか?--Wileecoyote81 2012年4月26日 (木) 07:32 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201325263 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijosai | revid=1201325263 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y|royalty=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=}} }}
== Translation and transcription from ja.wikipedia.org version? ==
I've read through both the English and Japanese versions of the article, and there's so much information present in the latter but not the former, even notation of items such as the ''inetsuki-no-uta''. I hope that the English page will be renovated to hold this information as well. I'd also personally advise that the difference between the ''inamiden'' and ''takakaya-no-mikura'' be clarified, in the English and Japanese versions alike.
Best regards and have a lovely day, Alex. [[Special:Contributions/2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658]] ([[User talk:2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|talk]]) 00:08, 26 May 2023 (UTC)
:I agree. The article would be improved this way [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 04:36, 26 May 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daijosai here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Daijosai for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/96391510 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:大嘗祭 | revid=96391510 --> {{削除依頼ログ |talk=false |result1=版指定削除|page1=大嘗祭|date1=2018年10月13日 }} == 仏教の影響について == かなり素朴な疑問なのですが、大嘗祭の儀式に「仏教的色彩なども取り入れられた」とは具体的に何を指すのでしょうか？先帝の葬祭における仏教形式の導入や火葬については大嘗祭自体とは関係がありませんし、密教系の即位礼である「即位灌頂」も別個の儀式ですし、大嘗祭の式次第にどのような仏教様式が取り入れられたのでしょうか。--[[User:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月14日 (水) 08:24 (UTC) :「仏教的色彩云々」について取り除きました。--[[User:Kanbun|Kanbun]] 2007年2月21日 (水) 12:21 (UTC)
:Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 悠紀と主基について == 明治天皇の際の主基に安房国とあるのは阿波国を指すのではないかと思うのですが、どなたかお詳しい方確認願えますでしょうか?--Wileecoyote81 2012年4月26日 (木) 07:32 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
== Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1201325263 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: en:Talk:Daijosai | revid=1201325263 --> {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=mid|shinto=y|royalty=y}} {{WikiProject Holidays|importance=}} }}
== Translation and transcription from ja.wikipedia.org version? ==
I've read through both the English and Japanese versions of the article, and there's so much information present in the latter but not the former, even notation of items such as the ''inetsuki-no-uta''. I hope that the English page will be renovated to hold this information as well. I'd also personally advise that the difference between the ''inamiden'' and ''takakaya-no-mikura'' be clarified, in the English and Japanese versions alike.
Best regards and have a lovely day, Alex. [[Special:Contributions/2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658]] ([[User talk:2601:845:8100:74D0:808A:B3B2:2925:B658|talk]]) 00:08, 26 May 2023 (UTC)
:I agree. The article would be improved this way [[User:Immanuelle|'''Immanuel'''le]] ❤️💚💙 [[User_talk:Immanuelle|(talk to the cutest Wikipedian)]] 04:36, 26 May 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:05, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
